name: Dominik Rohe
background: Managing Director of BlackRock, Inc. since 2005. Head of BlackRock’s Latin America & Caribbean region from 2016 to 2019. Head of BlackRock’s Institutional Client Business in Germany, Austria and Eastern Europe from 2013 to 2016.
